items.description: Crash on I-80 eastbound between .2 miles east of Exit 120: PA 879 - CLEARFIELD/SHAWVILLE and 1.4 miles east of Exit 120: PA 879 - CLEARFIELD/SHAWVILLE. There is a lane restriction.
